context: Evaluates the agent's ability to respect an explicit override signal mid-interview by stopping immediately, never asking a further question after it.

checklist.name: Stops immediately
checklist.description: No further question is asked after the 'just decide for me' override signal

checklist.name: States assumed defaults
checklist.description: The agent explicitly names the default it is assuming for the unanswered verbosity question rather than silently picking one

checklist.name: Moves to final output
checklist.description: The agent proceeds to a synthesized recap/answer instead of continuing to gather more input
